CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, items Array(String));
SELECT arrayRandomSample(items, 2) as res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayRandomSample(items, 5) as res FROM test_array WHERE id = 3;
SELECT arrayRandomSample(items, 0) as res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayRandomSample(arrayJoin(items), 3) as res FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']) AS items);
SELECT a.id, arrayRandomSample(a.items, 3) as sampled_items FROM test_array a WHERE a.id IN (SELECT id FROM test_array WHERE id > 1);
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(items, 1) as single_item FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(arrayMap(x -> x + 1, items), 2) as incremented_sample FROM test_array;
